description: Style NoteThese shoes from fortune are a minimalist's reinterpretation of the classic derby. Wear these luxurious leather shoes with slim Fit formal shirts and trousers.Product DetailsTapering toe Derby shoe in black with lace-up fasteningLeather upper has stitch detailingLightly padded collar and tongue, soft sockliner for instep comfortTPU outsole with elevated heel and grooves for tractionMaterial and CareLeatherWipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner and polish or wax on leather parts Do not store in direct sunlight
